quantification.why: Essentially every comparison carries a computed figure, e.g. mean is '16.37% above the $204.94 median' and North is '53.83% above last-place West'.

specificity.why: Each recommendation names products/regions with figures, e.g. 'Bundle or reprice Sprocket: 238 units return only 15.80% of revenue at the lowest unit price, $4.75.'

insight_density.why: Multiple non-obvious, actionable observations appear — revenue concentration (Gadget's 33.43% from just 7 orders), the mean-median skew, and the Sprocket outlier of high units/low revenue.
